title: Google worker charged with using internal data to make $1.2m on Polymarket
description: The longtime Google employee was charged in New York for allegedly breaking insider trading laws.
content:
A Google employee has been arrested for allegedly using his access to company information to successfully place lucrative bets on the prediction platform Polymarket.

title: US justice department reportedly opens criminal inquiry into Trump accuser E Jean Carroll
description: Officials said to be examining whether Carroll committed perjury in 2022 deposition tied to lawsuits against president
content:
The Trump administration has opened a criminal investigation into E Jean Carroll, the writer who accused the president of sexual assault, according to news reports.
Prosecutors, the New York Times and CNN reported on Wednesday, are looking into wheth... [2136 chars]

title: ‘Utterly appalling’: anger over swimmers in Hampstead Heath wildlife ponds
description: Nature groups urge people to avoid unauthorised areas to protect birds during nesting season
content:
Nature groups have pleaded with swimmers to give wildlife a wide berth after dozens of people swam in a nature pond on Hampstead Heath among nests of baby birds.
Swans and their 12-day-old cygnets were disturbed by hordes of splashing revellers in th... [3018 chars]

title: Brexiters peddled ‘nationalistic pish’, said Reform UK’s Makerfield candidate
description: Robert Kenyon castigated Brexit as an economically self-harming project on rugby league forum in 2016
content: Reform UK’s candidate for the Makerfield byelection has castigated Brexit as an economically self-harming project promoted by politicians who “peddled the nationalistic pish”, raising more doubts about his commitment to Nigel Farage’s signature achie... [2265 chars]

title: US carries out new strikes on Iran military site
description: The US military said it targeted a military site in Bandar Abbas - a strategic port city - and shot down four Iranian attack drones.
content:
The US military has carried out new strikes on Iran, targeting a military site in Bandar Abbas, a strategic port city.
US Central Command (Centcom) confirmed its forces also shot down four Iranian one-way attack drones "that posed a threat around the... [1331 chars]
